Ntc Of Motion
Off Calendar Mar-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Robert J. Donovan, Esq., for Chong Cook, Plaintiff/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Chong Cook's Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition is granted. Late opposition has not been considered. Defendant is ordered to attend his deposition, to be noticed by Plaintiff, and to be completed no later than April 6, 2007. Defendant's failure to attend his deposition pursuant to notice was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
